editorial.headline: Paris: classic landmarks, strong dining, luxury shopping, and neighbourhoods that shape the whole stay
editorial.intro: Paris is one of the strongest city-break destinations for travellers wanting landmarks, polished dining, elegant hotels, and world-class shopping. It works best when the stay is planned by area, since the Right Bank, Saint-Germain, Le Marais, and the Golden Triangle all deliver very different experiences.
why_visit: A leading destination for culture, dining, luxury stays, and iconic city experiences
Excellent shopping across luxury avenues, major department stores, local boutiques, and design-led districts
Strong fit for couples, first-time Europe trips, and premium short stays
Neighbourhood variety makes it easy to tailor the trip to style, pace, and interests
highlights: Very good for 2 to 4 day city breaks
Strong fit for couples, luxury travellers, and shopping-led itineraries
Best results come from planning by district rather than moving across the city too often
transport_tips: Use the Metro for efficient cross-city travel, but walk within each neighbourhood whenever possible.
Stay central if this is a short trip, as Paris travel time adds up quickly between areas.
Book top restaurants, major museum slots, and premium spa treatments in advance.
Taxis and rideshare are useful in the evening or when moving between shopping districts and dinner reservations.

neighborhood_tips.name: Saint-Germain-des-Prés
neighborhood_tips.tip: Best for elegant Left Bank stays, refined cafés, galleries, and a polished Paris atmosphere.

neighborhood_tips.name: Le Marais
neighborhood_tips.tip: Ideal for boutiques, local shopping, food, and a more lively neighbourhood feel.

neighborhood_tips.name: Golden Triangle
neighborhood_tips.tip: Best for luxury hotels, designer shopping, and premium city-break stays.

neighborhood_tips.name: Opéra
neighborhood_tips.tip: A strong base for department-store shopping, central access, and classic Paris convenience.

neighborhood_tips.name: 7th arrondissement
neighborhood_tips.tip: Good for elegant streets, landmark access, and a more classic first-time Paris setting.

restaurants.headline: Recommended restaurants in Paris
restaurants.description: A practical mix of classic Paris institutions, polished modern dining, and strong guest-friendly recommendations.

content.short_description: A classic Paris dining recommendation with strong atmosphere and first-time visitor appeal.
content.long_description: Le Train Bleu is one of the easiest Paris restaurant recommendations for guests who want a recognisable and elegant Paris experience. It works especially well for first-time visitors, celebratory meals, and travellers wanting atmosphere as much as the meal itself.
highlights: Good for a memorable lunch or dinner
insider_tips: A strong recommendation when guests want something visually iconic and unmistakably Parisian.
Best booked ahead for prime times.

recommendation.editor_note: A very reliable recommendation for guests wanting a recognisable Paris dining experience.

content.short_description: A polished Paris recommendation with strong atmosphere and premium city-break appeal.
content.long_description: Girafe is a useful recommendation for guests wanting a stylish Paris dining experience in a location that feels special. It suits couples, celebratory trips, and travellers looking for a premium dinner with strong visual impact.
insider_tips: Best for guests who value atmosphere and occasion as much as the food itself.
Advance booking is important for peak dinner periods.

google_places.name: Girafe
google_places.formatted_address: 1 Place du Trocadéro et du 11 Novembre, 75016 Paris, France

recommendation.editor_note: A strong recommendation for premium couples trips and stylish Paris dining.

content.short_description: A strong recommendation for guests wanting a more contemporary Paris dining option with local credibility.
content.long_description: Clamato is a useful recommendation for guests who want a stylish but less formal Paris meal with strong food quality. It works especially well for couples, repeat visitors, and travellers who want something more current than classic formal dining.
highlights: More contemporary than classic Paris institutions
insider_tips: A good recommendation when guests want a more modern and less ceremonial dining experience.
Best suited to food-led itineraries rather than formal luxury evenings.

recommendation.editor_note: A strong recommendation for guests wanting a more current food-focused Paris meal.

activities.headline: Top activities in Paris
activities.description: Guest-friendly recommendations that work well for short stays and first-time visits.

content.short_description: One of Paris’s strongest museum recommendations for guests wanting a high-value cultural visit.
content.long_description: Musée d'Orsay is one of the most useful Paris activity recommendations because it feels major and memorable without being as overwhelming as the largest museums. It works especially well for first-time visitors, couples, and guests wanting one standout cultural stop.
highlights: More manageable than some larger museum experiences
insider_tips: A very good option when guests want one major museum rather than a packed culture day.
Timed entry booking is recommended.

google_places.name: Musée d'Orsay
google_places.formatted_address: 1 Rue de la Légion d'Honneur, 75007 Paris, France

recommendation.editor_note: One of the strongest single cultural recommendations in Paris.

content.short_description: A classic Paris activity recommendation with broad appeal and strong first-time visitor value.
content.long_description: A Seine cruise is one of the easiest Paris recommendations because it gives guests a scenic and recognisable experience without requiring a full museum or landmark schedule. It works especially well for couples, first-time visitors, and shorter stays.
insider_tips: Evening departures are often strongest for atmosphere.
A useful recommendation when guests want one easy iconic activity.

recommendation.editor_note: A very useful recommendation for guests wanting one recognisable Paris activity with low planning friction.

gyms.headline: Gyms and fitness options
gyms.description: Useful options for guests wanting a proper workout beyond a standard hotel gym.

content.short_description: A strong premium gym recommendation for guests wanting a more polished fitness environment in Paris.
content.long_description: Ken Club is a useful choice for travellers who want a more premium and club-like fitness experience than a standard hotel gym. It works best for longer stays, fitness-focused guests, and premium travellers already staying on the Right Bank or western Paris side.
insider_tips: Best for guests specifically asking for a proper gym option.
Check access and visitor policies in advance.

google_places.name: Ken Club
google_places.formatted_address: 100 Avenue du Président Kennedy, 75016 Paris, France

recommendation.editor_note: A strong premium recommendation for guests who care about workout quality in Paris.

content.short_description: A useful boutique fitness option for guests who prefer structured classes and a more modern format.
content.long_description: Episod Raspail is a practical recommendation for guests who prefer boutique fitness and guided classes rather than a traditional gym floor. It works well for solo travellers, shorter stays, and guests already familiar with studio-based fitness formats.
insider_tips: Best for guests who prefer a scheduled workout rather than open gym training.
Book ahead if a specific class time matters.

recommendation.editor_note: A useful recommendation for guests who prefer modern class-based training.

spa_wellness.headline: Spa and wellness recommendations
spa_wellness.description: Strong premium options for guests wanting treatments, relaxation, or a polished wellness break in Paris.

content.short_description: One of Paris’s strongest luxury spa recommendations for premium and celebratory stays.
content.long_description: Ritz Club & Spa is a very strong recommendation for guests seeking a high-end wellness experience in a classic luxury Paris setting. It works especially well for couples, luxury travellers, and guests already planning a premium city break.
insider_tips: Best booked well ahead for treatments and peak periods.
A particularly strong recommendation for luxury itineraries and celebratory stays.

recommendation.editor_note: A top spa recommendation for premium Paris stays.

content.short_description: A highly polished Paris wellness recommendation for guests seeking a modern luxury spa experience.
content.long_description: Dior Spa Cheval Blanc Paris is a strong recommendation for guests who want a premium and contemporary spa experience in central Paris. It suits luxury travellers, couples, and guests combining high-end shopping, fine dining, and wellness in the same stay.
highlights: Excellent fit for premium city breaks
insider_tips: A particularly good recommendation for guests already focused on luxury shopping and premium dining.
Advance booking is essential.

recommendation.editor_note: A strong premium spa recommendation for guests building a luxury Paris itinerary.

shopping.headline: Shopping recommendations in Paris
shopping.description: Paris is one of the world’s strongest shopping destinations, with luxury avenues, flagship department stores, premium malls, local boutiques, and design-led areas that suit very different kinds of travellers.

content.short_description: One of Paris’s strongest luxury shopping recommendations for premium fashion and designer retail.
content.long_description: Avenue Montaigne is the clearest recommendation for guests seeking luxury shopping in Paris. It works especially well for premium travellers, fashion-focused trips, and anyone staying around the Golden Triangle or nearby luxury hotels.
insider_tips: Best for guests specifically wanting luxury labels in a polished Paris setting.
Combine with nearby fine dining or a premium hotel-based afternoon rather than trying to cover too many shopping districts at once.

recommendation.editor_note: The strongest Paris recommendation for luxury fashion shopping.

content.short_description: One of Paris’s most useful and iconic shopping recommendations for fashion, beauty, and gifting.
content.long_description: Galeries Lafayette is a very practical recommendation for guests who want a recognisable Paris department-store experience with broad shopping coverage in one place. It works especially well for short stays, gift shopping, and central hotel bases around Opéra.
insider_tips: Best when guests want one major shopping stop instead of moving between several smaller areas.
Useful for short city breaks with limited shopping time.

recommendation.editor_note: One of the most practical and recognisable shopping recommendations in Paris.

content.short_description: A refined Paris shopping recommendation with a more polished and less hectic feel than larger department stores.
content.long_description: Le Bon Marché is a strong recommendation for guests who want a premium department-store experience in an elegant Left Bank setting. It works especially well for design-conscious travellers, luxury shoppers, and guests staying around Saint-Germain.
insider_tips: A better fit than larger stores for guests who want a more refined pace.
Easy to pair with Saint-Germain cafés and boutique shopping.

recommendation.editor_note: A top recommendation for elegant premium shopping on the Left Bank.

content.short_description: A strong practical shopping recommendation for guests wanting broad retail coverage in a central area.
content.long_description: Westfield Forum des Halles is a useful recommendation when guests want convenience, variety, and central access rather than a purely luxury shopping day. It works especially well for families, longer stays, and practical city shopping needs.
insider_tips: Not the most characterful shopping choice, but very useful when convenience matters.
Best for guests wanting a broad retail mix in one location.

recommendation.editor_note: A practical recommendation for broad retail needs in central Paris.

content.short_description: A strong local shopping recommendation for guests wanting boutiques, fashion, and a more characterful Paris atmosphere.
content.long_description: Le Marais is one of the best shopping recommendations in Paris for travellers who prefer independent boutiques, concept stores, smaller labels, and a more local atmosphere over formal luxury avenues. It works especially well for repeat visitors, younger travellers, and design-conscious guests.
highlights: Good for fashion and lifestyle browsing
insider_tips: Best for guests who want atmosphere and variety rather than pure luxury retail.
Works especially well when paired with lunch and a slower neighbourhood walk.

recommendation.editor_note: A top recommendation for guests wanting boutiques and a more characterful shopping day.

content.short_description: A standout Paris recommendation for guests interested in design-led shopping, gifts, and lifestyle retail.
content.long_description: Merci is one of the most useful shopping recommendations in Paris for guests who want a design-forward retail stop rather than a standard fashion store. It suits design-conscious travellers, gifting, and visitors who want something distinctive and recognisable.
highlights: Excellent for gifts and lifestyle browsing
insider_tips: Best for guests interested in interiors, lifestyle, and design rather than broad fashion shopping.
Easy to include as part of a Marais shopping plan.

recommendation.editor_note: A standout shopping stop for design-conscious guests and gift-focused browsing.

featured.reason: Top luxury shopping recommendation in Paris.
A classic Paris dining recommendation with strong first-time visitor appeal.
One of the strongest single cultural recommendations in Paris.

Best for local boutiques and a more characterful side of Paris shopping.
Top luxury spa recommendation in Paris.

seasonal.reason: Especially strong during festive shopping and holiday periods.

Luxury wellness pairing for a premium city stay.

Best for boutiques and local shopping atmosphere.

A more modern food-led dinner pairing.
